function.name: answer
function.description: Write video prompt for each first frame image. One video prompt for one first frame image prompt.

video_prompts.description: List of video prompts, each corresponding to a first-frame image prompt.

action.description: Description of the action or movement in the video.

line.description: Dialogue or spoken line (if any) in CHINESE!!

female_character_sound.description: Vocal quality and age of the female character (e.g., 'cute young girl sound', 'raspy elderly mature lady sound', 'breathy teenager girl sound', 'warm middle-aged woman sound').
